message:
refactor(audit): remove resolved ambient findings and update assertions

With the WebSocket frame masking and server connection timestamp now
properly plumbed through capabilities, two ambient findings are resolved:
- Critical: getrandom::fill() in net/websocket/frame.rs (now uses EntropySource)
- Warning: Instant::now() in server/connection.rs (now uses injectable Time)

Updates:
- Remove the two resolved AmbientFinding entries from KNOWN_FINDINGS
- Add explanatory comment noting frame.rs and handshake.rs use capability plumbing
- Rename test critical_findings_exist → critical_findings_resolved
- Assert critical count == 0 instead of >= 1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
